diagnosis.title: System Diagnosis
diagnosis.storage_desc: Check cache usage and free space
diagnosis.verifying_notif: We are verifying if your device is ready to receive push notifications.
diagnosis.permission_desc: Ensure the app can send messages
diagnosis.test_desc: Attempting to send message from server
diagnosis.success: Diagnosis complete! Your device is configured correctly.
diagnosis.internet_verifying: We are testing latency and stability of your connection.
diagnosis.internet_success: Your connection is stable and ready to use.
diagnosis.internet_error: Connection problem or server not responding.
diagnosis.storage_verifying: Calculating space used by temporary files (cache).
diagnosis.clear_confirm_desc: This will delete temporary files. You will not be logged out.
diagnosis.version_verifying: We are comparing your version with the latest on server.
diagnosis.version_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch version data from server
